gpu_power_watts.reason: DCGM exposes average board power where supported by the GPU and driver.

gpu_power_instant_watts.reason: DCGM exposes instantaneous board power on supported devices.

gpu_temperature_celsius.reason: GPU core temperature is a native DCGM field.

gpu_memory_temperature_celsius.reason: HBM or memory temperature is exposed by DCGM where the device supports it.

gpu_memory_used_bytes.reason: Framebuffer memory used is exposed by DCGM and normalized from MiB to bytes.

gpu_sm_active_ratio.reason: SM active ratio is a DCGM profiling counter.

gpu_sm_occupancy_ratio.reason: SM occupancy ratio is a DCGM profiling counter.

gpu_tensor_pipe_active_ratio.reason: Generic Tensor pipe activity is exposed by DCGM where profiling counters are enabled.

gpu_dram_active_ratio.reason: DRAM active ratio is a DCGM profiling counter.

gpu_pcie_tx_bytes_per_second.reason: PCIe TX throughput is derived from a DCGM byte counter.

gpu_pcie_rx_bytes_per_second.reason: PCIe RX throughput is derived from a DCGM byte counter.

gpu_nvlink_tx_bytes_per_second.reason: NVLink TX throughput is derived from a DCGM byte counter.

gpu_nvlink_rx_bytes_per_second.reason: NVLink RX throughput is derived from a DCGM byte counter.

gpu_c2c_tx_bytes_per_second.reason: C2C TX traffic is a byte counter where Blackwell dual-die telemetry is supported.

gpu_c2c_rx_bytes_per_second.reason: C2C RX traffic is a byte counter where Blackwell dual-die telemetry is supported.

gpu_xid_error_code.reason: The last observed XID error code is exposed by DCGM.

gpu_ecc_sbe_total.reason: Single-bit ECC totals are exposed by DCGM.

gpu_ecc_dbe_total.reason: Double-bit ECC totals are exposed by DCGM.

gpu_retired_pages_total.reason: Retired pages are exposed through DCGM ECC page retirement fields.

fp4_tensor_core_utilization.reason: Always-on DCGM exposes generic Tensor pipe activity but not verified live FP4 attribution.

fp8_tensor_core_utilization.reason: Always-on DCGM exposes generic Tensor pipe activity but not verified live FP8 attribution.

nvfp4_tensor_core_utilization.reason: Always-on DCGM exposes generic Tensor pipe activity but not verified live NVFP4 attribution.

transformer_engine_activity.reason: Frameworks can report precision mode and transformer-engine usage but DCGM does not expose semantic Transformer Engine activity.

decompression_engine_utilization.reason: nvCOMP or application metrics can report compressed and decompressed bytes but native DCGM decompression engine utilization is not verified.

hbm_gb_per_second_per_workload.reason: DCGM can expose DRAM active ratio but exact per-workload HBM GB/s requires CUPTI Nsight or app-level attribution.

ras_engine_internals.reason: Visible RAS signals are exposed through ECC remap XID fabric and NVLink errors. Raw RAS-engine internals need a vendor API.

coolant_temperature.reason: GPU APIs expose GPU and memory temperature. Coolant temperature must come from CDU rack BMC Redfish or facility telemetry.

confidential_compute_attestation.reason: Confidential-computing status may be available through NVML or an attestation SDK depending on host and driver support.

confidential_compute_performance_guarant.reason: No live counter proves no performance drop-off. This must be measured with controlled workload benchmarks.
